data.title: Super Micro Impacted By AI Server Delays And Nvidia Supply Limits, Analysts Lower Forecast
data.description: SMCI stock drops on weak Q3 results, analysts issue mixed ratings. Needham reinstates Buy rating with $39 PT, Wedbush neutral with $30 PT, JP Morgan lowers PT to $35. Company faces near-term headwinds but has strong long-term potential.

data.title: $1000 Invested In Texas Pacific Land 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
Long-Term Decline In Cereal Market Poses Structural Challenges For Kellogg, Analyst Says
data.description: J.P. Morgan analyst Ken Goldman rated WK Kellogg (NYSE:KLG) Neutral with a $19 price target after Q1 EPS of $0.20 missed estimates. Revenue fell short at $663M vs. $679.49M forecast. KLG cut its 2025 outlook, projecting a 2–3% drop in organic net sales and flat to lower EBITDA. Ongoing cereal category struggles, rising capex, and tariff risks justify a valuation discount, the analyst noted.

data.title: Beyond Meat Reports 'Disappointing' Q1 Results, Issues Soft Guidance Following 'Slowdown' In Consumption, Shares Slide
data.description: Beyond Meat Inc (NASDAQ:BYND) reported first-quarter financial results after the market close on Wednesday. Here's a rundown of the report.

data.title: Netflix Keeps Hitting New Highs: Can TikTok-Style Feed, OpenAI Search Power Even More Growth?
data.description: Netflix is using OpenAI to better recommend selections for users while a new TikTok-style video feed will play clips of hit shows and movies to boost engagement.
